arts.ttl: Man Utd OUTBID Real Madrid for Alphonso Davies
arts.sum: Manchester United will massively outbid Real Madrid in the race to sign Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies . Some positive discussions followed and Bayern decided to head into the new season with Davies on board despite the fact that the two parties are no closer to reaching an agreement.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham’s bonuses still to be paid: how much could Real Madrid owe?
arts.sum: On the team side, Madrid will owe more if they win titles such as LaLiga or the Champions League, or if they qualify for the latter over the next six years – the period covered by Bellingham’s contract, which runs until 2029. While the exact details of the variable clauses were not disclosed, an estimate can be made of what Madrid has paid and may still owe for the English midfielder.

arts.ttl: 'I've scored more than Kylian Mbappe this term - now I'm being backed to replace Mo Salah'
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt star Omar Marmoush is being linked with a move to the Premier League after making a blinding start to the season, scoring 10 goals in 10 matches

arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Real Madrid-Borussia Dortmund: Luka Modric assist to earn minutes and fearsome front three
arts.sum: Real Madrid kick off a crucial week against Borussia Dortmund at the Santiago Bernabeu, with one eye on El Clasico coming this Saturday. A rematch of the Champions League final, both sides look somewhat different compared to their clash at Wembley, as Dortmund sport a new manager in Nuri Sahin, and no Mats Hummels or […] The post Predicted Teams Real Madrid-Borussia Dortmund: Luka Modric assist to earn minutes and fearsome front three appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Toni Kroos reveals how he told Carlo Ancelotti about his retirement
arts.sum: Real Madrid legend Toni Kroos has revealed that Carlo Ancelotti expected him to stay at the Bernabeu for at least another year, making it difficult to announce his retirement. Madrid cruised to last season's La Liga title and his last ever club match was the triumphant Champions League final against Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Most valuable players in 2004/05: Ronaldinho ahead of Thierry Henry - Real Madrid without a title
arts.sum: Apart from introducing market values, the 2004/05 season offered several other highlights. Liverpool beat AC Milan in the Champions League final despite being 0-3 down at halftime...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Borussia Dortmund 2024 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch Champions League online
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Borussia Dortmund in what will be rematch of the past 2023-24 Champions League Final played at Wembley, which saw Los Blancos conquer their 15th European title. HOW TO WATCH, STREAM UEFA CHAMPIONS LEAGUE

arts.ttl: Former Borussia Dortmund head coach Edin Terzic a candidate for the West Ham job if Julen Lopetegui is fired
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that former Borussia Dortmund head coach Edin Terzic is a candidate for the West Ham job if the current head coach is fired. Terzic is currently without a…

arts.ttl: When Bayern Munich and Borussia Dortmund thumped Barcelona and Real Madrid in 2013
arts.sum: This week’s Champions League has delivered Borussia Dortmund vs Real Madrid and Bayern Munich vs Barcelona on back-to-back nights, and if that sounds familiar, it’s for good reason. The new league phase has given us some interesting ties so far, but none quite on the level of Bayern against Barca, both six-time European champions who top their respective leagues as two of the form teams on the continent.

arts.ttl: Who is István Kovács, the referee for Real Madrid vs Dortmund today?
arts.sum: In his first appearance in the Champions League this campaign, Romania’s István Kovács will referee Real Madrid and Borussia Dortmund’s matchday-three clash at the Bernabéu today, as the tournament holders bid to return to winning ways against the team they beat in last season’s final . The referee’s two Dortmund games were both in the group stages of the Champions League : the 1997 winners’ 2-1 victory at Zenit St Petersburg in December 2020, and their 3-1 win at AC Milan in November 2023.
